_comment: ICP Backtest template. Copy this file and fill in real customer data for a specific seller. DO NOT fabricate customer lists — use the seller's actual current customers.

seller.name: Your Seller Name
seller.icp_summary: Brief ICP description — who they sell to, what size, what problem

_known_good_guidance: Minimum 8 companies for statistical confidence. 15-20 ideal. These MUST be the seller's real, current, healthy customers. Fabricated customers defeat the purpose.
_negative_controls_guidance: Minimum 5. Pick companies that are structurally wrong: wrong industry (a reinsurer for a consumer-rewards seller), wrong size (20-person startup for enterprise seller), or wrong buying model (no budget owner for this product).
_expected_guidance: Calibrate after the first run. Default thresholds work for most sellers. If known-good median is 48, consider whether the ICP is slightly too narrow or scoring runs conservative — don't just fail it.
